zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Semark於1433年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾陳尼斯時，她的父親John Semark12歲，母親Lady Alice Lexham7歲。她於大約1456年與Sir William Sapcote在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1510年8月1日在她的家鄉享年77歲，埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾陳尼斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Semark于1433年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾陳尼斯时，她的父亲John Semark12岁，母亲Lady Alice Lexham7岁。她于大约1456年与Sir William Sapcote在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1510年8月1日在她的家乡享年77岁，埋葬在英国巴金哈姆爾陳尼斯。

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Semark was born in 1433, in Chenies, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, John Semark, was 12 and her mother, Lady Alice Lexham, was 7. She married Sir William Sapcote about 1456, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 1 August 1510, in her hometown, at the age of 77, and was buried in Chenies, Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Semark est née en 1433, à Chenies, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, John Semark, avait 12 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Lexham, avait 7 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Sapcote environ 1456, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 1 août 1510, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Chenies, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Semark 1433 in Chenies, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Semark 12 und ihre Mutter Lady Alice Lexham 7. Sie hat um 1456 in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Sir William Sapcote geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 1. August 1510 im Alter von 77 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Chenies, Buckinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Semark è nata il nel 1433 nel Chenies, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, John Semark, aveva 12 anni e sua madre, Lady Alice Lexham, aveva 7 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Sapcote circa 1456, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 1 agosto 1510, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolta a Chenies, Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Semarkが1433年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアチェニーズで生まれた時，父John Semarkは12歳，母Lady Alice Lexhamは7歳であった。約1456年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドでSir William Sapcoteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1510年8月1日に故郷で77歳で死去し，イギリスブクインガムシュアイアチェニーズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Semark(이)가 1433년 영국 벅잉함실르 천이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Semark(은)는 12세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alice Lexham(은)는 7세였다. 그녀는 대략 1456년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 Sir William Sapcote(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1510년 8월 1일 그녀의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 벅잉함실르 천이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Semark nasceu em 1433, em Chenies, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Semark, tinha 12 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Lexham, tinha 7 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Sapcote aproximadamente 1456, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1 de agosto de 1510, em sua cidade natal, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Chenies, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Semark родилась в 1433 г. в местности чэниесь, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Semark было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Lexham, 7. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Sapcote около 1456 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 1 августа 1510 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности чэниесь, буккингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Semark nació en 1433, en Chenies, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Semark, tenía 12 años y su mamá, Lady Alice Lexham, tenía 7 años. Se casó con Sir William Sapcote aproximadamente 1456, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 1 de agosto de 1510, en su pueblo, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultada en Chenies, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.
